message.content:
Audit every public-facing page of a real estate website for launch readiness. Read ALL of the following files completely and report back detailed findings per file — every issue, every placeholder, every TODO, every broken import, every styling inconsistency, every copy problem. Do not summarize vaguely; I need specific line numbers and exact text.

Files to audit:

1. client/src/pages/home.tsx — full read
2. client/src/pages/about.tsx — full read
3. client/src/pages/contact.tsx — full read
4. client/src/pages/development.tsx — full read
5. client/src/pages/investments.tsx — full read
6. client/src/pages/systems.tsx — full read
7. client/src/pages/marketflow-beta.tsx — full read
8. client/src/pages/sell.tsx — full read
9. client/src/pages/submit-deal.tsx — full read
10. client/src/pages/privacy.tsx — full read
11. client/src/pages/terms.tsx — full read
12. client/src/components/navigation.tsx — full read
13. client/src/components/footer.tsx — full read
14. client/src/index.css — full read
15. client/src/App.tsx — full read (routes, providers, anything odd)

For each file report:
- Fake/placeholder content (fake stats, fake testimonials, placeholder phone numbers, "TBD", "TODO", "LOREM", "PLACEHOLDER", "555-", "123-456", "example.com")
- Risky copy (guaranteed returns, "typical annual returns", "principal protected", "DRE", "BBB", "A+ rating")
- Broken or missing imports
- Hardcoded dark colors that don't belong (bg-[hsl(220...), text-ivory, text-muted-ivory) on light-theme pages
- Missing pt-16/pt-20 top padding (nav is fixed, pages need padding-top)
- Sections that look empty or need content
- Inconsistent typography or section heading styles
- Missing SEO (useSEO calls with no title/description)
- Contact/form issues
- Any text that says "Bay Area" when it should say "East Bay"
- Animation imports that may be broken (ScrollReveal, StaggerChildren etc from @/components/animations)

Report breadth: very thorough

1. Introduction

18

19 Pegasus Dreamscapes Corp ("Company," "we," "our," or "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our real estate investment platform services. 20

2. Information We Collect

25

Personal Information

26

    30
  • Register for an account on our platform
    • 31

38 This information may include your name, email address, phone number, mailing address, property details, investment preferences, and financial information relevant to investment transactions. 39

Automatically Collected Information

43 When you access our platform, we automatically collect certain information including your IP address, browser type, operating system, access times, and the pages you view. We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. 44

    • 58

    • 59
  • Comply with legal obligations

4. Information Sharing and Disclosure

65

66 We may share your information in the following circumstances: 67

68
    69

    • 70

    • 71
  • Legal Requirements: We may disclose information if required by law or in response to valid legal processes.
    • 72
  • Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction.
    • 73

77

5. Data Security

78

79 We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security. 80

Page has zero SEO metadata. **Required fix**: Add `useSEO()` hook with title and description to each function. --- ### Risky Financial Claims (Investment Disclaimer Missing) **Severity: CRITICAL** — Unqualified return projections without proper disclaimers - **partner.tsx, Line 432-433**: Shows `
8-12%
` followed by `

Typical annual returns

` - This is "typical annual returns" language WITHOUT adequate disclaimers that returns are not guaranteed - No statement that past performance is not indicative of future results - No risk warning that principal may be lost **Required fix**: Add prominent disclaimer: "These are projections only. Actual returns may vary. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Principal is not protected." --- ### Legal Jurisdiction Mismatch (Terms of Service) **Severity: HIGH** — Internal contradiction could invalidate dispute resolution - **terms.tsx, Line 130**: States disputes "shall take place in the state where our principal place of business is located" - **terms.tsx, Line 151**: States "These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Arizona" - **Issue**: Pegasus is based in East Bay, California, NOT Arizona. Arizona jurisdiction is incorrect. **Required fix**: Change line 151 from Arizona to California (or match the actual principal place of business). --- ### Geographic Inconsistency – "Bay Area" vs "East Bay" **Severity: MEDIUM** — Mixed messaging about service area - **about.tsx, Line 36 (SEO description)**: "a Bay Area real estate investment company" — Vague - **about.tsx, Line 132**: "Bay Area Based" (heading) - **about.tsx, Line 145**: "Deep Bay Area Knowledge" (subtext) - **about.tsx, Line 362**: "Connected with top real estate professionals across the Bay Area" - **footer.tsx, Line 90**: "Bay Area, California" (contact location) - **home.tsx**: Multiple references to "Bay Area" **Issue**: All About page references say "Bay Area," but should emphasize "East Bay" per company positioning (Oakland, Berkeley focus). Footer also says "Bay Area" when contact mentions are East Bay-centric elsewhere. **Compare to correct usage**: - **contact.tsx, Line 130**: "East Bay, California" ✓ (correct) - **about.tsx, Line 79 (in stats)**: "East Bay" ✓ (correct) - **about.tsx, Line 363**: "East Bay and Bay Area aligned network" (partially correct but redundant) --- ## CRITICAL QUALITY ISSUES ### Missing Top Padding on Primary Page **Severity: MEDIUM** — Navigation overlap issue on hero section - **home.tsx, Line 84**: `

Also on line 36, `userRole` defaults to `""` which could cause role-checking bugs. --- ## STRUCTURAL & CONTENT ISSUES ### Incomplete Privacy Policy Contact Section **Severity: LOW** — Formatting error - **privacy.tsx, Lines 133-136**: The contact div has a trailing `
